mano_cua.result_summary: Tauri 桌面应用，Vite 前端在浏览器渲染完全黑屏。控制台报 TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'metadata')，Svelte 应用未能挂载渲染。mano-cua 101 步确认页面全黑无任何可交互 UI 元素，无法测试缩放和右键菜单定位功能。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The page at localhost:5173 shows a completely black screen with no visible UI content. The Chrome browser is showing the Markpad website but the application is not rendering any visible interface.
